overview.description: The Vanguard Extended Duration Treasury ETF (EDV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market value-weighted index of high-duration, zero-coupon US Treasury securities. EDV was launched on Dec 6, 2007 and is issued by Vanguard.

data.title: 30-year Treasury yield tops 5.1%, highest in nearly a year
data.text: Treasuries spiked on Friday as inflation signals continue to muddy interest rate expectations under the new Federal Reserve chair Kevin Warsh.
